emails.subject: Re: deal 501404.01 (language)
emails.body: Re: deal 501404.01 (language) I guess Paul Choi spoke with Melissa Murphy when she was up here and told her the language looked fine on this confirmation. He reiterated that, and I'll fax the initialed copy back to you. Thanks, Kate Stephanie Piwetz 01/29/2001 10:58 AM

emails.subject: deal 501404.01 (language)
emails.body: deal 501404.01 (language) Kate, I will be faxing you a confirm that we received back executed. The cp made some changes to the prices section. Just wanted to get it approved by the Traders. If so, can you please initial and fax back to 713-646-2443, so we can have the record in the system. Thanks Stephanie
